characters.name: Michael Barlow
characters.description: Michael Barlowis the former husband of Colleen Fitzpatrick, who he drugged into a psychotic stupor originally seen as demonic, and the murderer of Father Armando Aguilar. Barlow married Colleen in a classic get-rich-quick motive, as her family ran a department store franchise. Barlow wanted full control of the inheritance, and he began having an affair with psychiatrist Dr. Elizabeth Randall to implement his crimes, making her the primary care physician of Colleen’s psychiatric health. Barlow gave Colleen LSD-laced candies to render her psychotic under the influence of the drugs, Dr. Randall sabotaging the efforts to get her tested, which would’ve already been problematic to specifically look for the hallucinogen. Barlow hoped Colleen’s instability would leave her being incompetent to have power of attorney, so he’d be in control of the family’s inheritance and overall finances, which would’ve been null under a prenup if he killed Colleen or she divorced him. Colleen became violent enough her family believed she was possessed and consulted Father Armando Aguilar to help exorcise her. One night, it all went wrong when Colleen saved an LSD candy for Father Aguilar, and he succumbed to the effects of the drug. Michael saw this, and believing he’d be lucid enough to realize the truth and report him, Michael struck Father Aguilar with a bookend and send him tumbling down the stairs, killing him. Colleen took the fall when she as found over Father Aguilar when he was dying., so her mother Helen covered it up. D.A.Manny Devaloswas a friend of Father Aguilar’s, andAllison DuBoishad dreams about his death, so they investigated. When Colleen was suspected, she was hospitalized pending a competence for trial hearing. Dr. Randall presided over her evaluation, and Colleen had another psychotic episode, although she mustered she didn’t kill Father Aguilar. Dr. Randall herself made the slip that Colleen wasn’t sick, as her preliminary fraudulent "diagnosis" was schizophrenia, but Dr. Randall emphasized it was progressively chronic, not with lucid periods like Colleen had.

characters.name: Judy Bennette
characters.description: Dr.Judy Bennetteis a neurologist and a copycat killer of serial killerGil Bureli, who she’s later set up on a date with byAllison DuBois. Dr. Bennette had a patient, Melinda Sully, who had a pituitary adenoma Dr. Bennette couldn’t diagnose, and by the time Melinda got the confirmation of what it was, it was inoperable. Melinda filled a civil suit worth millions, which would’ve cost Dr. Bennette her practice and career. As the "Centennial Park Strangler" was killing women in the park with piano wire, Dr. Bennette replicated the crime to kill Melinda, then threw the evidence in doggy bags at the scene before fleeing. Allison dreamed she and Bureli would be soulmates, so when she met Dr. Bennette for a follow up regarding her recovery from medical problems, she invited Dr. Bennette to Bureli’s restaurant in hopes they’d meet. Dr. Bennette eagerly inquired about Allison’s abilities, and after Allison told what she could, she was deflated hearing Bureli wasn’t in. All wasn’t for naught, as Bureli and Dr. Bennette got into a fender bender and arranged a picnic date. However, Burrell blitzed Dr. Bennette and choked her to death as well.

characters.name: Albert Bunford
characters.description: Albert Bunfordis a real estate developer, who nearly opened his latest neighborhood on grounds contaminated by industrial byproducts. Bunford was building Willow Hill on land diseased by chlorahydrofromade, which caused leukemia from long-term exposure or high and rapid dosage. Bunford wanted confirmation, so he hired medical studentsDavid Channingand Gary Albright to test the toxin on lab rats, who all rapidly died of leukemia from the chemical. Bunford paid off the two students to bury the reports, which Channing took, but Gary wasn’t so impressionable. Gary went to his addiction recovery sponsor, DetectiveLee Scanlon, to report the crimes, and when Channing found out, he killed Gary with a drug overdose to cover up his part in the conspiracy.Allison DuBoisdreamed her daughterMariewould get leukemia, so she planned to move, coincidentally to Willow Hill. Allison’s visions of the toxins’ effects at the neighborhood, coupled with Scanlon finding dead rats form the test in Gary’s car trunk, led to the full picture being painted. Bunford was confront everything at the site, and he emphatically rejected all notions of the crimes and prevented the potentially homebuyers from overhearing. When Scanlon caught Channing when he was detoxing and used it to get a confession out of him, he gave up Bunford, who was sentenced to hundreds of years in prison once he was convicted.

characters.name: Gil Bureli
characters.description: Gil Bureli(aliasThe Centennial Park Strangler) is a serial killer of women in a local Phoenix park whoAllison DuBoisdreams about under the presumption he’s a man she’s supposed to play matchmaker for. Bureli was a local restaurant owner and a member of the local Small Business Association. He also refused to pay traffic ticket after traffic ticket, collective owing the cities of Sonoma and Phoenix thousands of dollars in his debts. For reasons unknown, aside from presumably anger, persecution complexes, and a need for feeling powerful, Bureli started strangling women to death with piano wire in Centennial Park. He would hang around at the crime scenes and pretend he had a problem with the killer’s nickname just to survey the investigation. After killing two women, Dr.Judy Bennettestalked and killed Melinda Sully, a patient who was suing her, to disguise her death as another Strangler murder. Allison DuBoisBureli and Dr. Bennett would be soulmates, so as the investigation was being conducted, Allison arranged for the two of them to meet. They both had a picnic date at night, but turned into Bureli choking Dr. Bennette to death, which Allison was shaken by when she dreamed it. Bureli was arrested, but as Allison dreamed of Dr. Bennette disposing of evidence st the scheme of her crime, it confused the investigation when it came back to her and not Bureli. He was released, and he became a hated figure to the point it hurt his business, but he refused any blame. When Allison saw his collected tickets, she reported it, and he was arrested on a bench warrant since a judge in Sonoma found him guilty in absentia. Dr. Bennette sent Allison a dream of a meth-crazed liquor store robber and murderer in Sonoma, later becoming Bureli’s cellmate. As Bennette told Allison, the armed robber tried to rape Bureli, but when he fought back, the robber slammed Bureli’s head into the toilet until he died.

characters.name: David Call
characters.description: CaptainDavid Callis a commercial airline pilot for Sunbeam Airlines and the murderer of his wife Marcia. Call wanted to murder Marcia for months after she came into a tidy inheritance from her parents’ deaths. He waited until he had a delayed flight to provide himself an alibi, then left his security badge as an excuse to call Marcia out of the house. Call had Marcia and him eat and then get into his car, lying he wanted to kiss her before he left. After killing Marcia with a plastic bag over her head, Call, for reasons unknown, used the date of their wedding, March 31st, to pick coordinates in the desert to bury Marcia at. Call drove her car to a shopping mall to abandon it in a parking lot, then went back to make his flights to and from Cleveland. Believing his flight was on time, his neighbors seeing Marcia leave inadvertently provided him with a false alibi. Call filed a false police report, complete with a grief act.Allison DuBois, by this point, has dreams that Call is the pilot who saves a passenger flight from a disastrous crash in a major city, feeling a conflict of interest in whether she should turn Call in or not. Visions in Marcia’s discovered car lead Allison to find where she’s buried. She definitively realizes Joe is guilty from the matching details of the coordinates and date, which Call refers to in a live news statement. Allison visited Call to talk about the similarities, which Call pretended to take offense to. When he heft the room, Allison saw Call’s ID badge had grains of sand from the desert, so he swiped it to give to the police. In spite of its obtainmemt outside of lawful protocol, Call was stopped from his flight when a search warrant was obtained to find more sand in his house.

characters.name: Stephen Campbell
characters.description: Stephen Campbellwas a teenage neighbor and classmate of a youngAllison DuBois, who she dreamed would grow up to be a criminal from her early years of premonitions. When Allison was in high school, Stephen moved from Chicago into the house next to hers with his father, who would regularly beat him and owned a collection of vintage firearms. Stephen was originally sweet but awkward, and had a love for comic books. The girls had orange soda with him, and Stephen disturbed them by pulling out his dad’s periodical revolver when it wasn’t loaded. Allison’s childhood best friend Izzy still thought he was cute, but as Allison had dreams he’d become a sex offender targeting teenage girls, she grew afraid of him. Stephen brought Allison’s cat Pablo back to her, but he moved in for a kiss and she pulled away, which he tried to take as gracefully as he could. Stephen wanted to take her to a fair for comic books, but Allison tried to politely declined, saying it was more about herself than him. Stephen was still confused and hurt, and later that night, he eviscerated Pablo to death. Allison’s mother Diane would hear none of it, as she generally rebuffed their family’s premonitory abilities and wanted to get in the good graces of Stephen’s father from having feelings for him. Stephen later harassed Allison at the science fair, and Izzy didn’t pick up on it. Izzy’s opinions changed when she went to Stephen’s house with him, only for him to try and rape her before his father came home and she ran. Allison had her spend the night, and the attack, which Izzy made Allison keep quiet about, put a rift in their friendship. Diane made Allison against her better judgment deliver a plate of cookies she baked to the Campbell house, refusing a no from Allison despite her valid reasons. Allison hesitated to knock on the door, and the moment she was about to, Stephen shot himself through his mouth with his father’s antique revolver, killing himself with a loud enough blast Allison dropped and broke the plate in her hand. Allison was completely shaken, as she wished she could’ve done something to save Stephen by appealing to the best of him. When Allison grew up, she got to meet the teenage girl she saved from Stephen, Nancy Claymore, a classmate of her daughterAriel. It didn’t hit Allison at first, she only said Nancy looked familiar. Stephen grew up and found work in telecommunications marketing, still sharing a love for comic books. However, he also kidnapped and raped teenage girls across the country, not being caught because he wouldn’t stay where the girls were attacked to move on to his next work assignment. He reconnected with Allison when he met her and her husbandJoest the grocery store, saying they should talk over dinner. When Nancy Claymore was raped and killed, the team went through local sex offenders, and Allison was shocked to find Stephen was on the list. He was brought in for questioning once he became the prime suspect, and he lied the girl who reported h

characters.name: Oswaldo Castillo
characters.description: Oswaldo Castillois a Cabrera cartel hitmanAllison DuBoisinvests herself in catching to prevent him from targeting her and her family. Little is known about Castillo, except he’s a ruthless cartel hit a with a repertoire including torture, dismemberment, mass murder, and killing law enforcement and their families. He was in collusion with DEA AgentDaniel Muñoz, who he bribed to be the cartel’s mole so Costello would make regular escapees when authorities closed in on him. For some reason, things changed to the point Castillo killed Muñoz’s wife with a car bomb with Muñoz’s own reluctant complicity, the murder strengthening Muñoz’s cover with the sympathy card. When Castillo arrived in Phoenix Arizona, he kidnapped and tortured Detective Luis Ruiz, who was undercover to infiltrate the cartel.Allison DuBoisdreamed Castillo would kill her family, so she got involved in the case. Castillo later left Ruiz in pieces in various handheld coolers at the house of his family. There, Allison met Muñoz, and she was none the wiser of his cover. Before Allison was taken to the hospital for a tumor, she revealed Castillo’s latest hiding place, but Muñoz alerted him for another escape. Allison risked her life to postpone a surgery for the tumor to dream about what she was missing with Castillo, and it was that Muñoz was his mole and liaison he was bribing. She reported that to her colleagues, and they got Muñoz to hand over his phone after they tricked him to send him another alert and arrested him. Castillo was found and arrested as well, and Allison’s family was saved. With Castillo still at large, he retaliated against Allison by killing Joe and their daughters. For a year, Allison collaborated with Muñoz to find him, but Muñoz was always giving the tips needed for Castillo to stay one step ahead. When Allison tracked Castillo to his hideout, Muñoz arrived for yet another bribe. Hearing Allison break into the garage, Castillo and Muñoz investigate, only to find Allison aiming a revolver at them. She reveals she cut the gas line and wants to know why Muñoz took bribes, believing it was after his wife was killed. Castillo told the truth, but why Mrs. Muñoz died was never elaborated on. Castillo tried to bribe Allison, but she said wanted her family back and dared Castillo to shoot her with the gas in the air before she would. She went ahead and pulled the trigger anyway, and they all died when the house exploded.

characters.name: David Channing
characters.description: David Channingis a medical student with a drug addiction, and the killer of his roommate, fellow medical student and sober addict Gary Albright. Channing, whose father made a living as a postal worker, was being helped by Gary, who sponsored Channing as a sober partner. They partnered in lab projects together, one being conducting tests for Albert Bunford, head of Buford Properties. High amounts of chlorahydrofromade were appearing as byproducts at one of his developing neighborhoods, which he needed the two students to confirm was harmless. When Channing and Gary injected lab rats, they rapidly died from leukemia as a consequence of the toxins. Bunford would hear none of it, and he paid off the students to keep quiet so his operations would move forward. Channing was more susceptible than Gary, who was ready to call his sponsor, DetectiveLee Scanlon, and report all the crimes. Channing was afraid of the consequences and killed Gary with a forced overdose. Scallion himself got involved in the case, andAllison DuBoisdreamed about her daughterMariedeveloping leukemia, pressuring her to move the family to a different house. By shear coincidence, she was checking out Willow Hill, the neighborhood Bunford was building where chlorahydrofromade was in the ground. After Scanlon found Gary dead and rats dead from the toxins in his car, all the dogs were connected to the neighborhood. Allison recognized Channing from her dreams, and Scanlon himself deduced the truth about Channing. He convinced Channing to let him in, cuffed him to a chair while he was in withdrawal, and made him confess to killing Gary before being taken into custody. Channing’s testimony sent Bunford to prison for his crimes. In an alternate world, the DuBois family moved to Willow Hill, where Marie developed leukemia and Channing was her oncologist. Her condition progressed and she died, Allison taking it out on Channing and blaming him for how many of his patients died from the same cancer. Channing and/or his hospital took out a restraining order on her, and when Allison confronted him one last time, Channing denied all culpability and politely told Allison to reach his attorney. When he turned his back, Allison shot him dead.

characters.name: Donald Crommler and Kevin Flynn
characters.description: Donald Crommler and Kevin Flynna re a duo of statewide serial killers of women coordinating their murders and sending each other photos to enjoy their shared exploits. Crommler and Flynn would find public places to gas women, kidnap them, and then beat them overtime during their captivity until they died.  Crommler killed women in Scottsdale, Flynn in Phoenix.Allisonwas on the case due to the crimes being in her dreams, but dead stalkerLucas Harveywas sabotaging Allison’s dreams so she’d never find out the truth. When the authorities were closing in, Crommler shot Flynn to avoid him being a liability. As Allison continued to fail to see Crommler’s face because of Harvey, the last woman Crommler killed told Allison his name and then banished Harvey to hell with other people Harvey set up to die. Allison placed the calls she needed to so that Crommler would be arrested.

characters.name: Sophie Cullen
characters.description: Sophie Cullenis a newscaster and the alleged stalking victim of Peter Winant, who was really her lover she framed for killing her husband, Dan Taper. Taper ran the network Cullen was on, along with numerous other media outlets, and she hoped for his death to be in control of his companies and assets. She started an affair with Winant, a studio tech, and made him send videos of her he recorded around the city to her house, in the hopes of building a fake stalking case. Taper took the bait and reported Winant to the police, Winant giving a deliriously infatuated testimony as planned. With the bar set and no room for charges against Winant, Cullen stabbed Taper to death had one final tryst with Winant too, making sure his prints were on the knife to set him up. After she set Winant up, she sent him away, smeared the knife blade in Taper’s blood, and stabbed herself twice. She crawled to the phone and called 911, lying Winant raped and stabbed her after stabbing Taper. Cullen gave a testimony in the hospital while feigning tears, and the legal system bought it so much Winant shot dead when he tried to get past police presence at the hospital.Allisondreamed the truth, but the team didn’t have evidence against her, until Winant’s security cameras showed, contrary to Cullen’s testimony of never meeting Winant, she’s on his system to track apartment tatters coming to his apartment. As they have circumstantial evidence of her conspiracy, they bring her to the office and’s say they’re not charging her yet, but they’ve sent the tapes to various news outlets and the loved ones of Taper and Winants. Cullen is warrant she’s being investigated for the crimes before she’s left to leave.

characters.name: David Delaney
characters.description: David Delaneyis the killer of his wife Jessica’s schizophrenic and mathematical genius brother, who he used to hack into the stock market for investment fraud and then murdered to cover up his crimes. David was the former Senior Vice President of the Wilke & Price investment firm, still maintaining an account in Jessica’s name for stock investments after he left. David wanted to fudge the records of his investments to change his final numbers, so he’d come away with greater earnings either from the closure of the stock market with new investments, whether from insider trading or sabotaging the investments, or from appearing to have a hire net worth so he’d receive more business from clients. Jessica’s brother was a math prodigy, but he suffered paranoid schizophrenia, so David used his skills and insanity to brainwash him into believing if he conducted the same hacking into David’s firm that his company’s former passcode generator would provide, Jessica’s brother would benefit national security instead of breach it. David them booked Jessica’s brother a hotel room in Los Angeles, where he was left for some time to have psychotic episodes in front of witnesses would be none the wiser when David eventually pushed his brother-in-law off the hotel rooftop. Allisondreamed Jessica’s brother envisioned himself as action film star David Carradine, and David Delaney as an enemy agent. She directed DetectiveLee Scanlonto Los Angeles, where Jessica’s brother was found dead already, once the team got the case of his disappearance. Sorting through the visions of the dead man’s delusions, Allison figured everything out once seeing the Delaney in person, instantly recognizing David. Knowing he was the murderer, she went back to Jessica’s brother’s formulas and gave them toJoe, Allison’s husband with experience in engineering. Joe realized he was cracking a passcode generator, and Allison reported this to the team, and they realized David’s old firm gave the devices out. Knowing the motives were financial, they all got he needs records from Wilkie & Price that put everything together. With the Delaneys brought in again, David was confronted with everything, but he denied it all and demanded his lawyer, who was also in Allison’s visions. As the team brought him to the offices, Allison directed him to the interrogation and warned him he’d also be arrested for his role in covering up the crimes.

characters.name: Sam Elkin
characters.description: Sam Elkinis a wrongfully convicted inmate who was left to take the blame for the murder of his girlfriend, college student Amanda Crane. While Amanda was in school, Sam was working as an auto mechanic, and they were very much in love in spite of the people Amanda knew disapproving of Sam. Sam could never see Amanda on Tuesday evenings, and he inquired on what she was doing. Amanda, originally avoiding the question, admitted a man,Christopher Russo, paid for her college tuition so long as she slept in the apartment adjacent to his so he could watch her to act out a voyeuristic fantasy. Amanda would wear a sleep mask and nightgown and stay the night until she had to leave for school. Sam was worried maybe she was cheating on him or she was being abused, so he followed her to the location for answers. Amanda was outraged, and the couple fought and eventually broke up. Sam didn’t get over Amanda, calling her and showing up at her dorm room, so a restraining order was taken out on him. After avoiding her for a month, Sam went back to her dorm room and slammed on it, and in spite of Amanda’s roommate wanting to call the cops, Amanda sent her off and agreed to be alone with Sam. They had another fight at first, but they reconciled, cried, and slept together. Amanda promised to call off the job, but Russo couldn’t handle it and blackmailed her with pictures she took. When she threatened with the cops, Russo choked her to death, cleaned her car at a car wash, and left her in the vehicle. As Sam’s DNA were the only samples found, he was aggressively prosecuted by D.A.Manuel Devalos, found guilty, and imprisoned despite the accounts he gave of his innocence. Allison DuBoisrecognized Sam during his parole hearing as the man in a dream she had withKathleen Walsh, a legally blind music teacher who Russo was stalking after he leased his apartment to her. Seeing the connection between Kathleen being stalked by Russo and Amanda’s murder, she questioned Sam and promised to advocate for his exoneration. Sam gave his full account, and he told Allison he knew nothing about Kathleen, and the police were near pulling the stakeouts on her apartment to catch Russo. However, Allison dreamed of when Russo would watch her again, instructing Kathleen to throw coffee at Russo to stave him off until the police detained him. Sam was successfully released thanks to Russo’s conviction for Amanda’s murder and stalking Kathleen. When Kathleen was told the details on the case at the department and given a former apology, Sam was brought in for the two of them to personally meet, and they were glad to be introduced for the first time.

characters.name: Samantha Emory
characters.description: Samantha Emoryis the wife of Todd Emory, who she tried to kill after murdering private investigator Porter Hayes to avoid a divorce. Samantha married Todd, a successful real estate broker, for financial comfort, but she had numerous affairs outside of the marriage. Todd didn’t want Sam using him, so he hired Hayes to follow her and take incriminating pictures of her infidelities. Sam ended up shooting Hayes dead, then held Todd at gunpoint and forced him to dig a grave for Hayes and roll him into it. Prepared to shoot Todd as well, she made him lie on top of Hayes, but Todd grabbed Hayes’ ankle pistol and shot at Sam with it. She was wounded in her arm, and he made a getaway, but he ended up being hit by a car and ended up in the hospital. Sam fled and had her arm treated while preparing to take another crack at Todd while diverting suspicion from herself. Allison DuBoisexperienced a body swap with Todd when she ended up in a coma, so she hid at her family’s house as Todd despite the unsettling situation, but she eventually agreed to return to the hospital when D.A.Manny Devaloscame asking questions after her daughterAriel’s friend told her family and they called for the missing person reward money. Sam played the distraught grieving wife when she entered the hospital, making sure "Todd" remembered nothing about his accident. But when Allison finally dreamed the truth about the murder and the accident, by this point, Sam injected an air embolism into the IV line. As the doctors were rushing in with the crash cart, Todd, as Allison, arrived and, having seen in the comatose state all of Allison’s time in his body, leveled his full testimony at a confused Sam. Todd said Sam’s hair would match that which was found at the scene of Hayes’ murder, and when he tried to grab it, Sam knocked him down and ran off. Todd hitting his head in Allison’s body caused the body swap to return to normal. Allison and Todd, who was saved by the hospital staff, were themselves again, and Sam was arrested by hospital security until the police arrived to book her.

characters.name: Sheriff Gillery
characters.description: Sheriff Gilleryis the Yucca County sheriff and the rapist and murderer of Caroline Krueger. Sheriff Gillery was a law officer working off highly archaic, rights violating policies, including recruiting inmates as chain gangs for labor work for the county or police. Gillery solicited Caroline, then raped her, killings her when she fought back and burying her in the desert in his jurisdiction. When Caroline came toAllison DuBoisto report her murder, Gillery supervised her remains’ excavation. Gillery still showed respect for the Phoenix District Attorney’s office and Allison’s capabilities that helped the investigation, all too eager to place the blame onPaul Scanlonwhen he was suspected of the crime. Paul’s brother, DetectiveLee Scanlon, found the bathroom where Caroline was killed, and as Paul set up from beyond the grave, Lee brought Gillery to the scene. Gillery tried to kill Lee when his back was turned, and Lee did flatline, but Gillery was shot and killed by Lee when he saw Gillery in the mirror, Lee being narrowly resuscited and hospitalized.

characters.name: Victoria Gossett
characters.description: Victoria Gossettis the president of the Southwest Animal Rights Coalition and a murderer for the interest of hiding her organization’s corruption. Gossett was embezzling from her own organization’s funds to treat herself to the high life and impress donors. One of the volunteers, Melissa Treynet, discovered documentation on the crimes and placed them on DVD files. She made copies and sent them to multiple people she knew, including her boyfriend and fellow volunteer Shane Carnahan. As Melissa was doing undercover investigation while hired at the AgroUnited Factory Farm slaughterhouse, she made Gossett meet her in the nearby woods once sending her the evidence. Gossett tried to bribe Melissa with taking over the company, and when Melissa refused, the moment she turned her back, Gossett shot her dead with her personal revolver. To dispose of Melissa’s remains and frame AgroUnited, Gossett dismembered her and, using her ID, broke into the pig pens and fed Melissa’s remains to the pigs. Gossett played the concerned boss when Melissa was reported missing, meeting with AgroUnited’s CEO while playing up the most distracting accusations against the CEO she could. WhenAllisondreamed of a piglet at the pen named Barney she wanted to rescue, she consulted Gossett, who, impressing Allison with her operations and still feigning sympathy for Melissa, said she could pay the slaughterhouse for the pig, and she worked with Gossett for Barney’s safe placement at a $500 fee. Shortly after, Shane called Gossett with his evidence and demanded 50 grand in exchange for his silence, so she shot him and fed him to the pigs as well. When Allison knew Gossett was the killer from her dreams, she didn’t have any solid evidence until she realized how Gossett got rid of Melissa’s and Shane’s remains. With Barney’s stomach being X-rayed, not only were Melissa’s bones and teeth found, but the bullet used to kill her. Gossett’s advocacy was used against her to tell her that Barney, the only pig who ate Melissa and wasn’t slaughtered afterward, would get surgery to remove the bullet and compare the ballistics. Told by the legal team to sign a confession in exchange for no death penalty and inquiring if she still believed in her cause, she agreed and recoded a formal statement before her booking.

characters.name: Larry Greene
characters.description: Larry Greeneis a Phoenix PD vice lieutenant in league withElena Cabrera’s drug cartel, and the killer of undercover cop Jennifer Reed. Elena seduced DetectiveLee Scanlonto marry her, in the interest of making him a mole for her family’s cartel operations. When Lee refused and got into rehab after he was transferred out of vice, Lieutenant Greene, who was the best man at Lee’s wedding, sooner agreed to be the cartel’s mole. Detective Jennifer Reed was sent to infiltrate, and she found out the truth about Greene, so he killed her. Needing a cover, Greene tore out Jennifer’s eyes and left her with women the cartel killed after they were smuggled into America as drug mules. Greene hoped if the cops found Jennifer was with the other murdered women, they’d go after Elena and her family instead of him. Greene was the cop who personally identified Jennifer when she was revealed to be undercover. However, as Elena had some of Lee’s trust left, she went to him and demanded he hear her explanation. He arrested her regardless, hoping she’d work with the D,A., but the moment she was to be escorted away, Greene shot her. Greene tried to make Lee go with his cover of "justification" for the shooting, but Lee slammed Greene into a glass tank and incapacitated him for his arrest. Elena slowly died from the ballistic trauma.

characters.name: Gabe Helling
characters.description: Gabe Hellingis the murderer of Melissa Drake and the kidnapper and captor of his niece, Rebecca Coakley. Helling was a contractor who obsessed over Melissa when they were in Aurora, Texas, and she was planning to go to Dartmouth for college while he was directing work on her house. Helling was told by her family to keep away, but when she was planning to leave for college soon, Helling broke into the house while she was on the phone to kidnap her. When Melissa fought him, Helling broke her neck, and he fled. Helling left the town, and the murder was never solved for 15 years. He moved in with his sister Angela Coakley, where he started harassing his niece Rebecca. When he told her he wanted to be with her, she rebuffed him and packed to leave for college, but Helling chloroformed her and kidnapped her, holding her captive at one of his undeveloped properties. DetectiveLee Scanlontried to follow him, but lost him at the dentist’s office when he fell asleep in the parking lot. Helling then went back to where Rebecca was, told her he wanted her to take sedatives he conned from the dentist, and even confessed to Melissa’s murder. AsAllisondreamed about that, D.A.Manny Devalosdecided to investigate him for Melissa’s murder, hoping threatening him with the death penalty in Texas would get him to give up Rebecca’s whereabouts. It worked, and after Helling gave up the location, he was arrested and Rebecca was rescued.

characters.name: Kent Henley
characters.description: Kent Henleyis the ex-husband and kidnapper of business heir of Melissa Barrister. Henley was a set designer for museums and exhibitions. He married Melissa, the daughter of aerospace company founder Peter Barrister, honeymooning in Paris in a hotel that was later demolished. Due to Henley’s possessive personality, the marriage was a disaster, and Melissa divorced him after three years. When she was engaged to marry a man named Steven, Henley snapped, wanting to have Melissa to herself. He designed a cell resembling the couple’s hotel room and snatched Melissa at gunpoint to hold her captive in the cell.Allisonbegan having dreams of Melissa’s captivity before it happened, around the same timeJoewas applying for a job under Peter’s firm. Melissa’s mother Bonnie was eager to believe Allison from her repertoire, but Peter was against her deductions. Henley was eventually tracked from remembering Melissa using his name in her dreams, and he diverted the investigation as much as she could. What clued Allison in is seeing Henley later with s wound on his hand, a wound she envisioned Melissa inflicting on Henley by stabbing him with a corkscrew. This was a fight where Melissa tried to escape, but after breaking a bottle and threatening Henley with it, he wrestled it out of her hands. The D.A.’s office had no grounds to raid his office grounds, so they put in a fake fire report to evacuate the building and raid it to find Melissa’s cell. When she shouted for help through the sirens, she was found, and Henley was later arrested once he was tracked.

characters.name: Kira Hudack
characters.description: Kira Hudackis a self-defense instructor and vigilante sexual offender killer whoAllison DuBoiscomes across. Kira was violently beaten and repeatedly raped by an unidentified burglar, so she started a self-defense class for women who’ve been attacked or are afraid of an attack. At night, Kira would find released sex offenders through registries, tie them up in their own apartments, and beat them to death before burying them in grounds near a factory. When an undercover vice detective posed as "Henry Maynard", complete with a fake record, to try and catchPaul Scanlonfor raping a teenager, Kira believed the cover and killed him too, even after he broke free from his restraints and tried to stop her. Allison came to her class when she was mugged, and Kira recounted being attacked to inspire Allison to join. Allison was dreaming about Kira killing the detective and, believing it was when Kira was raped, showed her a photo, but Kira dispatched her beliefs. From there, Allison continued to dream and realized Kira was the aggressor. She found a photo of the detective to find out who he was, and she led the D.A.’s office to where he was buried. Allison found the missing sex offenders fitting the profile Kira would target, but she confidently denied everything. When Allison dreamed Kira would kill Paul next, she called her colleague and Paul’s brother, DetectiveLee Scanlon, to warn him. Lee, disgusted by Paul’s recidivism, left him to die by Kira’s hand, arrested Kira afterward, and lied he was too late in his official statement.

characters.name: Jeremy Kiernan and Mandy Sutton
characters.description: Jeremy Kiernan and Mandy Sutton(aliasThe Penny Jar Killers) are a serial killer couple of women in Phoenix taunting the police and obsessed with their relationships maintained through murder. Kiernan, an electrician’s assistant who had priors for drug possession and stalking, and Sutton had an M.O. of kidnapping women for five days, killing them, and then leaving them at the senes of the next woman they kidnapped. Each woman would be posed, typically hanging in closets, bound and gagged with electrical tape, and wearing their work uniforms after they died. Kiernan would place calls to the next woman they targeted after they died to terrorize them, referring to the next woman they kidnapped by name. The couple, originally assumed to be one killer, were given the moniker "The Penny Jar Killer", as a sick take on the phrase "give a penny, take a penny". Allisondreamed of the couple stalking and kidnapping Gretchen Morgan after killing her dog and leaving Naomi Clark hanging dead in her closet. As Allison remembered she had a parking ticket, she was found and questioned in the interest of protecting her. Kieran was seen casing the house and ran when the police tried to question him, only to die from being hit by a car. Kieran communicated from beyond the grave, lying he only ran from having drugs on him and not wanting to get caught, hoping to use Allison as a liaison to Sutton to clean up evidence of their crimes and continue their murders. However, even after Kiernan diverted suspicion to another suspect, Shane Malinowski, who was already dead, Sutton became so deliriously lovesick, she tried to hold Allison captive to question her for more answers. Eventually, Allison broke free and subdued Sutton long enough for police to arrive and Gretchen to be rescued. Allison later has a dream of Sutton’s execution and the couple reuniting after they’re dead only to eternally fight with each other, a result Allison more than plenty accepts.

characters.name: Tommy Lehane
characters.description: Tommy Lehaneis a soldier inMichael Benoit’s army division in Afghanistan and the killer of their commanding officer, Sergeant David Chadway, Michael had predictions of future attacks on the squad, so he would always warn his fellow soldiers to prepare and change their tactics to keep them all alive. Sergeant Chadway, a no-nonsense commander who degraded men underneath him for falling short on orders, refused the call off an operation that would get their men killed because Michael had a dream about it, calling Leanne a coward for suggesting it and Michael a drunk for leaning on beer to get through his service and PTSD. Lehane was done with Chadway and shot him in his head, staging his death as a suicide. Michael was the only other soldier to know the truth, and Lehane blackmailed him into silence, gaslighting him by saying they were good soldiers who did what they had to do to fight and return home. The operation withdrawal was a success, and they saved their men and came home to their families. However, Allison and visions of Lehane’s crime, and she saw Sergeant Chadway screaming at and terrorizing Michael when he tried to sleep to get him to confess. Leanne, during Chadway’s funeral, asked if Michael told and again said he needed to keep silent for everyone’s best interests, telling him not to go to the funeral since he couldn’t handle his guilt. Allison told him is guilt was the only thing he needed to hear to do the right thing, so she drove him to the funeral. While Lehane feigned sympathy to Chadway’s widow and son, Michael was stepping into the procession. Lehane stopped him one more time and said he had no place taking away Lehane’s moment of decision for telling Chadway’s family the traumatic truth. When Michael didn’t listen, Lehane said he was no hero, Michael replying all he wanted to recover from the war, heading off to tell the family the truth. Leanne was presumably arrested.

characters.name: Nick Lewin
characters.description: Nick Lewinis the killer of his friend Morgan Turley, whose crush, Cadence Bixby, Lewin stole from him after he died. Lewin shot Morgan dead in an alley and disguised his death as a mugging, as Morgan was depressed and suicidal. Morgan wanted his inheritance to go to Cadence, his neighbor he watched in a building across from his he Lyell in love with from her stray cat housing efforts. Lewin double-crossed Morgan after he died, wooing Cadence into a relationship and using the money he stole for an engagement ring for her. Morgan was oppositional againstAllisoninvestigating to not rat out Lewin and keep the inheritance deal in place. However, when Lewis was revealed to have deceived him, Morgan gave everything up, and the engagement ring was tied with the stolen money. Lewin was arrested in interrogation, where Cadence watched the whole confrontation to hear the truth.

characters.name: Justin Lydecker
characters.description: Justin Lydeckeris the son of tycoon Douglas Lydecker and a serial killer. Justin was a playboy type because of his father’s riches, but he secretly struggled with depression and suicidal ideation. At some point, for reasons unknown, Justin became sadistic as his health began to decline, and he targeted female homeowners in Phoenix to murder. In between his depressive episodes, Justin butchered women before cutting their eyes out. Douglas’ private bodyguard, former detective Brad Auerbach, would dismember each woman and throw then in a river in sacks. Allison started dreaming about the murders, so the company’s personal psychic, Caitlyn Lynch, was told to offer her a high-paying job to divert suspicion from her. Allison started dreaming of Justin wanting to shoot himself, recognizing him from his employee file at the company. After DetectiveLee Scanlonkilled Auerbach in self-defense, Allison dreamed conclusively that Justin was the killer. She reported to Caitlyn and Douglas, but they insisted on covering it up, sending Justin to Mexico City to be held captive and forcibly medicated by Douglas. However, Justin stopped taking the pills, eventually killing Douglas and going on the run. He was later arrested when coming back into Arizona, as was Caitlyn later, who envisioned Justin killing Douglas and didn’t prevent the murder so she could control the company.

characters.name: Liam McManus
characters.description: Liam McManusis a student atAriel DuBois’ school guilty of planning the murder of her teacher, Lisa Kerrigan, and to whom Ariel’s married in an alternate timeline where Liam also kills Ariel’s motherAllisonto stop the investigation. Liam was having an affair with Lisa and conceived their son Brendan, who everyone always assumed was the son of Lisa and her husband. Liam treated the relationship as casual and Brendan as an inconvenience to him, but Lisa wanted to go public and leave her husband for Liam at the risk of everything. Liam, a narcissistic sociopath, only thought of his plans for college and the rest of his life and planned to use his father’s gun to kill Lisa in her home while Ariel was babysitting Brendan. Ariel coincidentally had a crush on Liam and didn’t know the truth yet. When Liam knew she was planning a project presentation and was pulling all-nighters for her studies, he approached her and offer her the key to just station wagon so she could sleep on his mattress in the car. Liam was trying to manipulate Ariel away from suspecting him once he eventually went through with his plans. Ariel refused at first, but she somehow ended up taking that nap she was offered. Through a series of time warps and blackouts in her dreams, she realized what Liam was planning. The moment Liam woke her up for period change, she gave him his keys back, ordered him to never touch her, and ran off to report him. She skipped babysitting Brendan and went straight to Allison and her colleagues to report the crimes. Liam was arrested when he tried to get into the Kerrigan house with the pistol, confessing to everything in interrogation. Ariel was severely and grief-stricken from the entire ordeal. Despite Ariel refusing to sleep in Liam’s station wagon at first, she still woke up on his mattress when he alerted her to changing period, Ariel completely clueless as to how she ended up there. Later, Liam arrived at the Kerrigan house while Ariel was babysitting Brendan, and in spite of Lisa recognizing Liam through his ski mask, he shot her dead. Ariel blacked out from the trauma of the gunshot, then returned to caring for Brendan, until she came downstairs and saw Lisa dead in the living room. Ariel had another blackout, and due to her traumatized state, Liam took advantage of seduced Ariel into a marriage to divert her and her family away from him in their suspicions. He worked as a hedge fund manager, Ariel taught at the same high school she went to, and they had a daughter named Anna. Ariel’s memory wipes and blackouts from shock were convenient for Liam, but he pretended they took a toll on him. Ariel’s family generally trusted him and had no concerns about the guilt of his crimes he hid. When Allison realized he was guilty, Liam snuck into her house and shot her dead as well. Another blackout resulted in Ariel losing years of memory, and Liam again pretended to be exasperated, insisting Ariel not investigate Lisa’s and Allison’s murders. Ariel didn’t le

characters.name: Mr. Rondell
characters.description: Mr. Randellis a wedding photographer and a serial killer of couples he dares to take his test on how devoted they are to each other’s lives. Rondell scouted the married couples he photographed and found opportune moments to hold them captive in their house. Rondell would make the husband hold a gun on their wives and tell them to pull the trigger, in spite of the fact the gun was never loaded. None of the husbands went through with threatening the lives of their wives like that, so Rondell short each of the couples dead, disguising each of the crimes as murder-suicides. The first two victims were Lorraine Scanlon, the sister of DetectiveLee Scanlon, who was pregnant when she was murdered, and her husband.Allison DuBoisas called in with Lee when the fourth couple was murdered, Lee being oppositional to Allison, then outraged when he realized she was psychic. The fifth couple was targeted, but the husband, Mr. Conrad, did pull the trigger of the empty gun. When Rondell remarked he was the first husband to be pushed to that action, he shot Mrs. Conrad and left Mr. Conrad to take the fall, but that setup was a failure. When Allison had visions and dreams of pictures of the couples, dead and alive, Lee went to the wedding photos of the victims and realized they were all tasked by the same photographer. Rondell’s apartment was raided, and although he was gone, his collages of crime scene photos were all over his apartment walls. His studio had information on all the couples he photographed and was stalking. Allison heard Lee’s sister tell her which couple was next. Lee snuck in pretending to be the husband while Rondell was holding his gun on the wife with a ski mask one. He then said he was arresting Rondell and ordered him either to surrender or to give him a reason to shoot him dead. Rondell surrendered, then pontificated as he was arrested about his crimes and harassed Lee about he didn’t shoot Rondell for surviving by sticking to his scruples.

characters.name: Daniel Muñoz
characters.description: AgentDaniel Muñozis a DEA agent allegedly assisting in the hunt forOswaldo Castillo, but is revealed to be a corrupt double agent actively affiliated with Castillo and his evasion from justice. At an unknown point in time, Muñoz started taking hefty bribes from Castillo, a Cabrera cartel hitman, going on for years, in exchange for being the mole Castillo’s drug cartel needed so he’d have timely escapes mere minutes before police would arrive to arrest him. For unknown reasons, Castillo killed Muñoz’s wife with a car bomb, which conveniently diverted suspicion from him further to keep him on the case as the leak. AfterAllison DuBoisbecomes involved due to her envisioning Detective Luis Ruiz being tortured to death by Castillo, Muñoz is personally assigned to the case by the time Detective Ruiz is mailed by Castillo to his family, dismembered in bloody coolers. Allison first meets Muñoz when she’s looking through the file of his wife’s murder, and she recognizes him from having dreamed about him as if Castillo killed her entire family and a year had passed, which left Allison personally invested in stopping him. Allison envisioned Castillo’s latest hideout, but she had to be hospitalized for a brain tumor. Muñoz alerted Castillo so he would run again, then visited Allison to feign thanks and a promise to arrest Castillo for her and her family. When she dreamed Muñoz was in on the escapes the whole time, at the cost of her health, the investigative team tricked Muñoz into alerting Castillo again, then made him surrender his phone under the threat of capital charges. DetectiveLee Scanlontook the case personally, as Detective Ruiz was a professional friend of his and was ready to avenge him. Muñoz, after initial resistance and emphasizing his federal status, relinquished his phone and surrendered to arrest. Castillo was arrested shortly thereafter.

characters.name: Tom O'Bannon
characters.description: Tom O'Bannonis the husband and killer of oil business heir Sandra O'Bannon. Tom worked as a plastic surgeon and married Sandra solely for her inheritance. Sandra was spoiled from her riches, and Tom eventually planned to kill her, while not actually let the public know she was dead. He had a mistress named Lisa Wolfe, who he gave numerous cosmetic operations to look exactly like Sandra and replace her once Tom killed her. Tom rammed his car into a tree while on the road at an agreed spot to bury her, with Lisa waiting in the woods there after being left there hours before. Tom and Lisa prepared to bury Sandra, but as she was still alive, Tom bludgeoned her to death with the shovel they used to bury her. Allison DuBois, a psychic working with the police, was possessed by Sandra’s spirit, who resulted in her murder being reopened, much to the headaches of the people who knew Allison with Sandra hijacking her body and picking fights with everyone. It was bad enough she, as Allison, left the psychiatric hospital she was in to find Tom st the hospital, but as Tom was baffled to see her, Sandra was baffled to see Lisa look like her. When Sandra had a dream revealing her murder through Allison’s abilities, she directed Allison’s husbandJoeto where she was buried. After Sandra saw herself dead and left Allison’s body, Tom and Lisa were arrested with the evidence gathered against them.

characters.name: Bruce Rossiter
characters.description: Bruce Rossiteris a hostage-taker and murderer who holds his former colleagues at Aerodytech hostage, includingJoe DuBois, as a calculated plan to compensate for his firing. Bruce was employed by Aerodytech to design a satellite with a limited budget and materials he know couldn’t be launched to keep the satellite safely in orbit. Although Bruce was indeed on the ball, as the satellite crashed into Saudi Arabia, his boss, Dylan Kravitz, passed the buck to him and threw him out of his job in the company. After that, Bruce was told by his doctor he had a brain tumor that would kill him over two months. As Bruce had a wife, Gail, and a son to provide for and he didn’t even get a pension, he hoped to rob Aerodytech and given the money to his family, hoping a standoff with the police at the company would give the cover he needed to execute the plan. When Joe needed a ride to the office, Bruce saw that as a "sign" to provide for him the opportunity to execute his plan. In spite of Joe’s wifeAllisonhaving a premonitory dream he’d be in danger, Joe still went to work with Bruce. Kfavors was baffled by the time the two arrived as to why Bruce was there, and when Bruce argued his case, Kravitz reacted with exasperation by simply acknowledging Bruce no longer worked there and thus didn’t belong there. After some bickering, Bruce pulled out one of his pistols he brought with him, later firing a shot into the ceiling to prevent everyone from running. This resulted in police response and a command center station outside the office. Allison rushed over there, knowing Joe was still inside. Kravitz tried to rationalize with Bruce by saying they’d cover for him since no one was hurt yet, and then when he said he’d leave, Bruce removed his overcoat and showed his remaining sidearms to get him to not try. Bruce then prepared to steal company plans by breaching the firewalls, having already set up a buyer to deliver the money to an offshore account in the Cayman Islands for his family. He told one of the employees, Aaron Cahill, to carefully close the blinds so the police couldn’t see inside. Joe answered the police phone and gave them team updates, but when Joe said they were asking if Bruce hurt anyone yet, Bruce spontaneously shot Aaron repeatedly and killed him. Bruce then ordered Joe to hang up the phone and keep hanging it up if they called back to stop the police from negotiating. Bruce then ordered the employees to help him getting through higher clearance, and when they told him they couldn’t just get into the systems at their levels, he got furious and made them regardless.

characters.name: Christopher Russo
characters.description: Christopher Russois the murderer of Amanda Crane, for which her ex-boyfriend Sam Elkin was falsely imprisoned, and later the stalker of Kathleen Walsh. Little is revealed about Russo’s life, except he lived with his mother in their apartment until she died. Converting the space into two units, he decided to act out his fantasies of watching a woman sleep from being unable to approach women in his life. Russo hired college student Amanda Crane to regularly sleep in a prepared bedroom with a sleep mask and sleep at night, leaving without asking questions and being paid a salary she needed for her tuition. Russo would voyeuristically spy on her and took pictures while she was in the bed. When Amanda called off the arrangement, Russo blackmailed her with pictures he threatened to distribute. When Amanda planned to call the cops, Russo choked her to death and sent her car through a local car wash, before abandoning the vehicle and a dead Amanda in the passenger seat. Sam was falsely convicted and imprisoned when his DNA was found from an exam due to the two of them having sex. By Russo’s account, he was remorseful and shaken from his crime, done with pursuing women, and started renting the unit adjacent to his to various tenants. Kathleen, who was legally blind, was the latest tenant, and when Russo realized he could enjoy his fantasies again, he stalked her at night when she slept. Russo used a passage built into their living room closets with a shared wall to sneak in and watch her as she slept. Russo escalated by beginning to take pictures of her, and one night, Russo kissed her without consent. The last straw for Kathleen, she reported to the police, and thankfully,Allison DuBois, who dreamed of Kathleen being stalked and Sam being a witness, was present and took her statement to have police invested in her protection. Allison also knew Sam was innocent and worked to find answers based on his statements of their relationship and when he last saw her, finding a connection with Amanda’s tuition payments. When Allison saw Kathleen was being watched in the morning in her dreams, she called Kathleen and told her to throw her coffee at Russo where Allison said he would be. Kathleen acted nonchalantly on the phone, then chucked the coffee at him before she tried to run. Russo jumped Kathleen and tried to strangle her too, but police shot and incapacitated him before she could die. Russo recovered and would be sentenced to prison time.

characters.name: David Saunders
characters.description: David Saundersis a copy shop owner and a reformed, amnesiac serial killer of women in prostitution. Saunders found women being prostituted on the streets, who he would take to his home, tie up, and have aggressive sex with. Taking one of his bed pillows, he would ask each woman if they liked the desert before smothering them to death, burying them in isolated, arid sandy areas outside the city. Saunders repeated the ritual to kill at least four women in such fashions. He came across his future wife, Angela, when she was being pimped on the streets by the name of "Jade". After sex and too early a climax, Saunders was about to kill Angela as well, but her pimp, would rob johns when they took her home, broke in and knocked over a lamp. Saunders went downstairs and fought him, but the pimp shot him, the bullet passing through his head and leaving him within an inch of his life. The pimp cut Angela out of her restraints and made her leave, but later while he was high, she called for the police and paramedics to save him. Saunders miraculously lived, but he was left with permanent amnesia from the trauma to his brain. His friends retouch him everything about himself, his life, and what he loved that they knew of, all except his crime spree, which no one knew of. Angela, only knowing he picked her up and then the pimp shot him, tried to apologize at the hospital, but she realized what happened and was too nervous to tell him anything with how much happier he became. Saunders dedicated his life to community activities, including in the chamber of commerce and sponsoring the little league. Angela met him again at his copy shop, and as they spoke to each other more, the two of them fell in love and got married, Angela never really how they first met. Saunders hired her at his shop, and he devoted his life to her and hoping to start a family with her, something Angela never wanted to lose. However,Allison DuBoisfell and hit her head at home, needing MRI scans after she briefly lost her memories. She went to the same clinic as Saunders, who went for regular scans to watch his condition. Allison saw a loving man in him when she met with, but she saw visions of his crimes, the women he killed, and how his house was near a train station. She wanted to pass fliers out for Angela, who she most distinctly remembered from her necklace with her street moniker on it, but when she went to Saunders’ shop to make copies, Saunders was taken aback from shock and had Angela meet Allison to show why, Angela later told Allison the truth and pleaded her to not tell Saunders about how they met, as they wanted to spend the rest of their lives together. However, Allison couldn’t let it go, knowing that although Saunders was a different person, he was still guilty of the murders. When she saw out of his barely existent record of infractions, one of the women Allison envisioned was caught on a camera photo in the passenger seat of his car when he was speeding the night he murdered

characters.name: Andy Seward
characters.description: Andrew Sewardis the second cousin by marriage ofJoe DuBoisand the murderer of Julie Pinsley. Little is known about Seward’s history, except he would role-playStar Warscharacters with Joe when he visited, and he grew up to be a chemistry teacher. For reasons unknown, Seward kidnapped and raped Julie, then strangled her with his gloved hands when he was done brutalizing her. She was left in the trunk of her car at the airport of San Luis Obispo, where Joe was marryingAllison Rowlandand Seward was attending as a guest. Allison was getting dreams of Julie’s murder by Seward, along with future visions in her dreams of her daughterAriel DuBoisbeing raped and killed by Seward after he stalked her throughout her life until an age when he wanted to attack her. When Allison saw Andy at the rehearsal dinner, she became terrified of the implications to the point it nearly cost her and Joe the wedding. When Allison dreamed of where Julie was left, she called an anonymously tip into the police and restarted efforts for the wedding with Joe. While the couple exchanged vows, the police arrested Seward for Julie’s murder.

characters.name: Bethany Simmons
characters.description: Bethany Simmonsis a kidnapping-for-ransom victim who replicated her own kidnapping in a revenge scheme against the abductor,Christopher Sipes. Bethany’s family was extorted of $2 million when she was kidnapped for ransom,Cynthia Keenerprivately handling the ransom drop. Bethany was buried alive in a pine box in the desert near the drop point, Sipes, wearing an alien mask, took the money in the duffel bags from Keener, then pointed her to wear Bethany was buried before running. Keener narrowly dug Bethany out and rescued her. But with the financial blow to her family, while Sipes constructed a real estate presence with the stolen spoils, her father committed suicide and her mother accidentally drove off a bridge due to alcohol and drug abuse when Bethany was fifteen. After Bethany was put in the foster system, which was reportedly cruel to her, she took up drug abuse and eventually went into prostitution. Years later, she ended up getting solicited by none other than Sipes himself. While she sent him into the shower, she found his legal ID and planned to get revenge. Knowing Sipes had a wife named Amy, she kidnapped Amy, albeit not burying her out of mercy from Bethany’s own trauma and instead holding her captive under a drug stupor. She was indeed planning to release Amy, but the ruse was all to kill Sipes at the same drop point where Bethany was buried alive as an ultimate payback. Bethany waited until Sipes reported Amy missing direct to the D.A.’s office, then sent an identical Grand Canyon postcard with a ransom demand like Sipes sent Bethany’s family. Sipes acquiesced and lied Amy was vacationing in Mexico to drop the case, but when Keener was calling around to find Bethany from the prison where Keener was, Bethany couldn’t help but call her back.Allisoneventually dreamed the full picture, realizing Bethany was conducting a revenge scheme, and she got Keener out of prison in day clothes to confront Bethany, who was already at the drop site and staging the scene to look like Amy was buried. Bethany pulled her revolver and kept Keener back when she saw her, but Keener promised to get Sipes arrested with the evidence they had on him and told Bethany that Keener shooting her own daughter’s killer didn’t take her pain away and she hoped Bethany still had a chance. Bethany emotionally surrendered to arrest and gave Amy’s location, where she was safely found. It’s safe to assume Sipes was also arrested once the case was reopened.

characters.name: Christopher Sipes
characters.description: Christopher Sipesis the kidnapper for ransom ofBethany Simmons, who found Sipes years later and planned her revenge against him with the kidnapping of his wife Amy. Sipes wanted two million dollars from Bethany’s parents for her return. He sent a Grand Canyon postcard, with cut out letters spelling out his demands and that he’d kill her if the cops were involved. Sipes buried Bethany alive in a box in the desert at the drop point, but she permanently scarred Sipes with a bite on his hand beforehand.Cynthia Keenermade the drop to rescue her, and Sipes, wearing an alien mask, checked the money and the bags for the full amount and for trackers, then told Keener what he did to Bethany before running. Keener narrowly rescued Bethany, but she never got over her trauma, and the financial loss drove her parents to their deaths. Sipes built a real estate empire and married a woman named Amy, but he also solicited prostitutes. One coincidentally was Bethany, whose life also collapsed in the foster system. When Bethany recognized him, she found his driver’s license in the hotel room where she was taken to, and finding all she could on him, Bethany plotted her own kidnapping to terrorize Sipes in retribution. She snatched Amy, leaving Sipes panicking about her whereabouts and furious about the D.A.’s office not responding by urgently looking for her. Sipes repeatedly called off the investigation when Bethany sent an uncanny Grand Canyon postcard ransom to him.Allisondreamed about Bethany’s kidnapping and Keener’s involvement, so she enlisted Keener to help her. Allison also dreamed Bethany planned to kill Sipes at the drop point, but Sipes refused to delay the ransom drop. When Allison realized Sipes was the original kidnapper and Bethany was out for revenge, Keener was briefly released to talk Bethany down at the site, which was successful. Amy was recovered, not from being buried alive, but drugged and in a safe location, as Bethany never intended to scar Amy like she had been. Sipes was eventually tracked and arrested for Bethany’s kidnapping for ransom, using evidence against him that included the bite mark on his hand and a print on the ransom note he delivered.

characters.name: Jonathan Thigpen
characters.description: Jonathan Thigpenis a serial mass murderer of entire families, whose visions of his crimes are tied to a teenager he donated his blood to,Jennifer Whitten Thigpen was a sick killer obsessed with blood. He traveled around the country and donated his blood to who knows how many people to have a God-like presence in their lives from saving them. Thigpen eventually decided to become a serial killer of families in a disturbed way. He poisoned them all in their sleep bringing equipment to override any and all security systems in their houses. After draining the family entirely of their blood, they were dressed and posed in a room in their house to have them appear to be sharing some activity in the house as a family, including watching TV and eating dinner. Thigpen killed dozens of families across the country and stored their blood in bags in a cooler in his personal ice cream truck, marking their bags with photos of them to identify their blood. One person who received a blood donation from Thigpen is orphaned teenager Jennifer Whitten, who was narrowly saved from a car crash that killed her parents and left her clinging to life. Jennifer became homeless after running from abusive foster homes, but because Thigpen’s blood was in her body, she dreamed what he saw throughout his life and during his killings. She saw he practiced his crimes on wild animals, including a deer he shot, exsanguinated, posed, and placed in numerous public settings to photograph. She also saw him take photos and videos of the families he stalked before he murdered them.

characters.name: Sonny Troyer
characters.description: Sonny Troyer(aliasThe Bad Samaritan) is a serial rapist and murderer of women and girls with an ability to see them in dreams and kill them when they’re vulnerable. He taunts and stalksAllison DuBoisfor sharing the same ability. Troyer hoped for years to find someone with the abilities he had, being inspired to dare Allison to catch him when he saw her efforts for law & justice on TV. Troyer decided to specifically target women who were alone and vulnerable when they were in compromising positions or in need of assistance. Troyer first raped and strangled Amy Archer when she broke off her ankle sliding off a rock she was supposed to graffiti for a sorority hazing. He then raped and murdered a woman stranded on a desert highway when her car broke down. Even Allison was baffled as to how Troyer could go to such geographically distant locations and quickly kill women the moment he could isolate them. When a teenager named Taylor Greene away next, Allison tried to warn her over the phone, but when she hung up, she called the police to dispatch to her house for a reverse address search. Thankfully, Taylor was rescued. When Troyer saw Allison explaining her hunch as the lie that she passed Taylor’s house and saw Troyer outside the window, Troyer called her at night. He said he knew she had the same abilities as him and had searched for someone liked her, then said he was right in front of her house before speeding off. When Allison dreamed of Troyes getting stranded on a road when he was out of oil, Allison reported the location immediately. Troyer was arrested, convicted, and sentenced to three life sentences for murder. A woman Troyer killed in Aberdeen, Texas, being found resulted in the state wanting him extradited for execution. Troyer dreamed of a plane crash into the prison yard he’d use to escape shortly thereafter. He used the opportunity to call D.A.Manuel Devalosand say he wanted to killing Debra Waldman, but in exchange, he wanted his extradition stopped. The governor of Arizona called Texas and agreed to delay the extradition, but even when Allison dreamed Troyer would escape from the plane crash, it was too late to stop him. Troyer send Allison images of women he didn’t want to kill, even called her to harass her again, saying he wanted to kill her too. It was a distraction to murder the woman he targeted. After that killing, Troyer sent Allison a dream of a woman trapped on a roof, and she told the police to rescue her. However, it was the woman’s roommate, who was alone in their apartment, who was murdered, with "wrong roommate, Allison" written in her blood, the walls closing in on Allison, from her secret to her safety, DetectiveLee Scanlonand Deputy MayorLynn DiNoviplanned to seemingly remove Allison’s detail, making it seem like Lynn made the call for earlier than she agreed with Lee. As Allison was alone and vulnerable, Troyer took the bait and tried to break into her house to murder her. However, Lee stopped her outside her front

characters.name: Kathleen Walsh
characters.description: Kathleen Walshis a legally blind music teacher and the stalking and harassment victim ofChristopher Russo. Kathleen moved to a low-rate attached rental apartment Russo leased to her, shortly before she was to start her job. For six months, Russo, obsessed with watching a woman sleep while he couldn’t see her, snuck in through her living room closet, which shared a wall with adjacent unit, and Russo would stalk Kathleen from inside the apartment while she was sleeping. The stalking progressed to taking picture, and what led to Kathleen finally calling the police was Russo kissed her without consent. The responding police didn’t take her seriously, and she even reported them chuckling at her expense. She went to the police department directly with a friend to file her report, and she was told to wait several hours. Her friend left, so she was on her own to wait, butAllison, recognizing her from dreaming about her being stalked, brought her to DetectiveScanlon. She gave her report again, and sensing Scanlon also being despondent, she said she knew he was going to rebuff her report. After arguing with Allison about how it was both important to respond and tied to the false conviction of Sam Elkin for the murder of his ex-girlfriend, Amanda Crane, Allison and Lee agreed to as far as a police presence to watch her apartment and question the other tenants. With no new developments, the team on the case was ready to pull the plug, but Allison and a dream where she was speaking with Kathleen over the phone and Russo was watching her. When Allison saw it was around the time in her dream Russo was there, she called Kathleen and told her to throw her hot coffee at Russo. After pretending to speak to her mother over the phone, Kathleen threw the drink at Russo. When she tried to run, Russo tackled her and tried to choke her to death, but thankfully, Lee called for police, and they broke through the door and shot Russo when he refused to surrender. Kathleen was rescued, and Russo was prepared for a lengthy prison sentence. After Sam was exonerated and released, the legal team told her Russo’s background and crimes, and accepted their apologies, thanking them and saying her relief for Russo’s placement in custody. Sam was also at the department, so the team introduced the two of them to each other so they’d have the answers they were looking for.

characters.name: Greg Watt
characters.description: Greg Wattis the son of acclaimed Phoenix defense attorneyLarry Watt, who arranged for the suicide of Isabel Galvan, Greg’s accomplice in a felony campaign against his father. Greg wanted his inheritance from Larry, so he planned on a power of attorney by sending his father to prison. He took up suicide hotline volunteering in the hopes of trying to find a troubled, impressive accomplice, who came through Isabel. Greg seduced her over the phone and met her in person to start dating her for the purpose of using her. He then ordered her to seduce Larry when he was at a bar. She tape recorded their tryst and, as Larry knew who she was by then, was ordered by Greg to extort 15 grand from him. She was ordered during the money exchange to refuse it and threaten to tell Greg regardless, hoping Larry would fight her over it, which he did. She made him leave, then laced a call to Greg telling him the plan worked. What Greg said in response was numerous degrading insults against her, lying she failed the plan and he was breaking up with her. Isabel was so devastated she walked to the cliff side she was near, threw her phone and the record off, and then jumped to her death. Allisondreamed about Isabel’s suicide and helped the police to find her. Greg put on an act of fake emotion when identifying her in the morgue, Larry coming him to console and defend his case. But Allison’s visions went from seeing Greg’s car at the scene to how Larry was the one driving it. Larry was nearly convincingly framed for the crime and taken to trial, even though he testified Isabel was still alive after he left. But Allison followed the suicide hotline call Isabel made, and she realized Greg was behind everything from seeing him in a hotline promotional photo at the front desk. The Watts were brought in again after Isabel’s cell phone and tape recorder were found, and when they played the recording of Larry leaving Isabel behind, D.A.Manuel Devalosannounced they’d drop the charges against Larry. Keeping the Watts present for the rest of the recording, they revealed Greg’s true intentions at the suicide hotline and Isabel’s last words on the phone call with Greg before she died. Greg tried to tell Larry Isabel was to blame, but Larry left him behind. With Greg’s arrest warranted by the courts, Greg professed he’d get off on the worst charges with the difficult case, but D.A. Devalos swore to put Greg through the ringer at trial.

characters.name: Johanna Wheeler
characters.description: Johanna Wheeleris a kidnapper and murderer, colluding with boyfriends to hold women captive and torture them while she plays the victim, only for her to turn on them and personally murder them. Little is known about Wheeler, except she had a mother named Marion who owned a yarn shop in which Wheeler worked. Johanna enjoyed her casual relationships with submissive boyfriend, but as she was a sadist, she wanted more and hoped to use them for putting women in pain. One of her boyfriends, Peter Connolly, she directed to kidnap Suzie Keener, the daughter ofCynthia Keener, after the couple stalked her. They sabotaged her car, and Connolly snatched her during a stormy evening while he pretended to help her out. They held her captive in the basement of Wheeler’s last house, where Wheeler pretended to be another scared victim and "warned" Suzie to not provoke Connolly before he arrived. For months, the couple would act out Connolly pretending to rape Wheeler, before Connolly would rape and batter Suzie as Wheeler had directed earlier. As a cruel irony, Wheeler’s house was near Suzie’s neighborhood to ensure she’d eventually catch onto the signs and have false hope. The day Suzie planned an escape, the couple were prepared with signal performance, Connolly pretending to strangle Wheeler before carrying her away. When Susie broke free and ran to the front door, Wheeler was waiting, laughing and taunting Suzie about ow they made sure she believed she had a chance. Wheeler then bludgeoned Suzie to death with a golf club, and the couple sank her remains in a lake in an isolated mountain valley. Suzie’s disappearance encouraged Cynthia to become a private investigator, but she never had any leads with her daughter’s case.Allison DuBois, a psychic medium Cynthia blackmailed into working for her, however, had dreams about Suzie, recognizing her from Cynthia’s family photos. Realizing the truth, Allison assisted Cynthia in finding answers, including the house, which was now inhabited by a family, but Suzie wasn’t there, dead or alive. Wheeler was eventually identified, and when Marion was told about Cynthia and Allison suspecting her daughter being missing, Marion called Wheeler. Wheeler, who had a new boyfriend and accomplice and was torturing a woman named Melanie Linder, changed her plans to cover for herself. She shot her boyfriend dead, then called the police to have then rescue Melanie, while also "rescuing" her to divert suspicion from her. Allison dreamed the truth about Wheeler and Suzie’s murder, so she and Cynthia were determined to arrest her, no matter how much she kept denying her crimes and feigning sympathy to Cynthia. Even after Suzie’s remains were found, they didn’t have a case, as Wheeler harassed Connolly into committing suicide to take his testimony to the grave for her. Cynthia eventually snapped, broke into Wheeler’s house, and shot her in her head. Cynthia waited at the front steps at called Allison to sit with her until she was arrested.
